recommendations.title: Justice League: Crisis on Two Earths
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A heroic version of Lex Luthor from an alternate universe appears to recruit the Justice League to help save his Earth from the Crime Syndicate, an evil version of the League. What ensues is the ultimate battle of good versus evil in a war that threa

recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Catwoman
recommendations.overview: Catwoman attempts to track down a mysterious cargo shipment that is linked to a Gotham City crime boss called Rough Cut.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Doom That Came to Gotham
recommendations.overview: Explorer Bruce Wayne accidentally unleashes an ancient evil, and returns to Gotham after being away for two decades. There, Batman battles Lovecraftian supernatural forces and encounters allies and enemies such as Green Arrow, Ra's al Ghul, Mr. Freez

recommendations.title: Batman: Gotham by Gaslight
recommendations.overview: In an alternative Victorian Age Gotham City, Batman begins his war on crime while he investigates a new series of murders by Jack the Ripper.

recommendations.title: Batman: Soul of the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Bruce Wayne faces a deadly menace from his past, with the help of three former classmates: world-renowned martial artists Richard Dragon, Ben Turner and Lady Shiva.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Doom
recommendations.overview: An adaptation of Mark Waid's "Tower of Babel" story from the JLA comic. Vandal Savage steals confidential files Batman has compiled on the members of the Justice League, and learns all their weaknesses.

recommendations.title: Superman/Batman: Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: Batman discovers a mysterious teen-aged girl with superhuman powers and a connection to Superman. When the girl comes to the attention of Darkseid, the evil overlord of Apokolips, events take a decidedly dangerous turn.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Killing Joke
recommendations.overview: As Batman hunts for the escaped Joker, the Clown Prince of Crime attacks the Gordon family to prove a diabolical point mirroring his own fall into madness.

recommendations.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Test pilot Hal Jordan finds himself recruited as the newest member of the intergalactic police force, The Green Lantern Corps.

recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Death
recommendations.overview: Vincent, an artist with unresolved inner demons, meets a mysterious girl who helps him come to terms with his creative legacy… and eventual death.
